text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Adam: A Method for Stochastic Optimization" is real, authored by **Diederik P. Kingma** and **Jimmy Ba** (ICLR 2015). However, the cited authors "P. K. Diederik" and "B. Lei" are completely fabricated — neither name matches any actual author of this paper. This is a classic hallucination pattern: a real title grafted onto entirely wrong author names.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/1412.6980
